title: pterocarpus trifoliatus
intro: Pterocarpus trifoliatus, also known as the Strychnine tree, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. The Strychnine tree is a medicinal plant that has been used for centuries to treat various health conditions due to its rich content of flavonoids and tannins. The medicinal properties of Pterocarpus trifoliatus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and digestive issues treatment. The plant's extracts can be prepared through various herbal methods, including decoction, infusion, and tincture, which are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
